   &NumOfAuxCBasisFuncts [&Type "Integer"] 0
   &NumOfAuxJBasisFuncts [&Type "Integer"] 0
   &NumOfAuxJKBasisFuncts [&Type "Integer"] 0
   &NumOfCABSBasisFuncts [&Type "Integer"] 0
$End
$Calculation_Timings
   &GeometryIndex 7
   &GSTEP [&Type "Double"]       1.0756000000000043e-01
   &XTB [&Type "Double"]       2.6389259999999997e+00
   &XTBGRAD [&Type "Double"]       4.9090000000002743e-03
